title: RIOT Strategic Guidance Outlook and 2026-2027 Earnings Expectations
text: Looking forward from Q1 2026, RIOT Platforms management has articulated clear operational priorities for the remainder of 2026 and into 2027 that should drive earnings expansion. Management's five core objectives for 2026 include: 1) Delivering AMD megawatts on schedule, with initial 5 MW delivered in January and remaining 20 MW expected by May 2026, 2) Executing additional data center leases at both Rockdale and Corsicana sites with strong tenant interest, 3) Advancing core and shell development for 112 MW of data center facilities at Corsicana, 4) Securing attractive project financing for data center buildout, and 5) Growing the power pipeline through greenfield development, self-generation partnerships, and strategic acquisitions. The company has disclosed that operating lease revenue is expected to reach an annualized run rate of $37.8 million by the end of 2026, scaling to $55.6 million after full 50 MW AMD delivery in 2027. For 2027, the company anticipates 168 megawatts of completed core and shell data center infrastructure at Corsicana, providing the foundation for multiple additional tenant leases. Management has guided to approximately 22% bitcoin hash rate growth in 2025, suggesting moderation from prior years' ambitions due to facility expansion delays. The cumulative effect of these initiatives should drive significant earnings growth through a combination of higher-margin data center revenue recognition and improved bitcoin mining margins if cryptocurrency prices remain elevated.
